[1m[1;36mBuilt-In Theme Macro Demonstrations[0m
Predefined themes combining geometry layouts with zebra-striping and boundary padding!

[95m│[0m[97m[45m[1mA[0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m B [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m C [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m D  [0m[95m│[0m [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1mA[0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m B [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m C [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m D  [0m[95m│[0m     [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1mA[0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m B [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m C [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m D  [0m[95m│[0m    [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1mA[0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m B [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m C [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m D  [0m[95m│[0m          [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1mA[0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m B [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m C [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m D  [0m[95m│[0m    [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1mA[0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m B [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m C [0m[95m [0m[97m[45m[1m D  [0m[95m│[0m

[95m│[0m[37m[40m1[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mAl [0m[95m [0m[37m[40m123[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mGood[0m[95m│[0m [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1m1[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mAl [0m[95m [0m[37m[40m123[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mGood[0m[95m│[0m     [95m│[0m[37m[40m1[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mAl [0m[95m [0m[37m[40m123[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mGood[0m[95m│[0m    [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1m1[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mAl [0m[95m [0m[37m[40m123[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mGood[0m[95m│[0m          [95m│[0m[37m[40m1[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mAl [0m[95m [0m[37m[40m123[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mGood[0m[95m│[0m    [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1m1[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mAl [0m[95m [0m[37m[40m123[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mGood[0m[95m│[0m         
[95m│[0m[37m[40m2[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mBob[0m[95m [0m[37m[40m122[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mBad [0m[95m│[0m [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1m2[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mBob[0m[95m [0m[37m[40m122[0m[95m [0m[37m[40mBad [0m[95m│[0m     [95m│[0m[97m[100m2[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mBob[0m[95m [0m[97m[100m122[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mBad [0m[95m│[0m    [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1m2[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mBob[0m[95m [0m[97m[100m122[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mBad [0m[95m│[0m          [95m│[0m[37m[40m2[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mBob[0m[95m [0m[37m[40m122[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mBad [0m[95m│[0m    [95m│[0m[97m[45m[1m2[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mBob[0m[95m [0m[37m[40m122[0m[95m [0m[97m[100mBad [0m[95m│[0m
